en.dayMasterDeep: Wood Dragon is a tall tree rooted in a clouded reservoir: growth, command, and stored storm energy. Dragon stores water, wood, and earth, so the life path often carries unfinished inheritance, latent ambition, and a talent for making pressure productive. The gift is turning unfinished potential into visible structure; the shadow is carrying too much pride or responsibility in silence. As a Yang Wood day master, you are not meant to live vaguely. Your chart asks you to give form to instinct, polish to talent, and rhythm to ambition. In K-pop terms, this is not background-member energy; it is the person who understands the whole stage picture, then finds the exact moment to make the center move believable. When balanced, you combine emotional intelligence with a practical sense of timing, so people feel that you are both memorable and useful. When unbalanced, the same intensity can become pride, secrecy, impatience, or a refusal to ask for help. Your life improves whenever you choose one strong lane, build repeatable habits, and let trusted people witness the process instead of only the final performance. Luck grows through disciplined expression, not through hiding your complexity.
en.career: Wood Dragon is a tall tree rooted in a clouded reservoir: growth, command, and stored storm energy. Dragon stores water, wood, and earth, so the life path often carries unfinished inheritance, latent ambition, and a talent for making pressure productive. The gift is turning unfinished potential into visible structure; the shadow is carrying too much pride or responsibility in silence. Career luck strengthens when you work where decisions matter and the result can be seen, measured, or felt by an audience. You suit roles that combine expertise with presence: strategy, product, content, management, design, finance, research, education, healing work, or performance depending on your training. The branch quality shows how you win: Dragon energy rewards timing, reading the room, and using pressure as material. You should avoid jobs that reduce you to repetitive obedience with no room for judgment. A strong mentor helps early, but later you need ownership. Build a portfolio of finished outcomes, not just ideas. Your professional reputation rises when your standards become consistent enough for others to trust under deadline.
en.wealth: Wood Dragon is a tall tree rooted in a clouded reservoir: growth, command, and stored storm energy. Dragon stores water, wood, and earth, so the life path often carries unfinished inheritance, latent ambition, and a talent for making pressure productive. The gift is turning unfinished potential into visible structure; the shadow is carrying too much pride or responsibility in silence. Wealth is best built through structure rather than mood. Your money luck responds to skill stacking, long-view planning, and knowing which relationships actually create value. Because the Dragon branch carries its own hidden rhythm, income may come in waves: quiet preparation, sudden opening, then a period where discipline decides whether the gain remains. Speculation, luxury spending, or emotional generosity can become leaks if you use money to prove confidence or affection. The better pattern is to separate cash flow, savings, investment, and creative risk. You can attract high-value opportunities when you package your taste and judgment clearly. Do not undercharge for insight that took years to earn.
en.love: Wood Dragon is a tall tree rooted in a clouded reservoir: growth, command, and stored storm energy. Dragon stores water, wood, and earth, so the life path often carries unfinished inheritance, latent ambition, and a talent for making pressure productive. The gift is turning unfinished potential into visible structure; the shadow is carrying too much pride or responsibility in silence. In love, you need more than surface compatibility. You respond to people who respect your pace, notice your effort, and can handle both the public version of you and the private weather underneath. The Dragon branch makes attraction specific: chemistry grows when timing, loyalty, and unspoken signals line up. You may test partners through silence, pride, speed, caretaking, or analysis depending on stress. That habit protects you briefly but can confuse someone sincere. The healthier path is direct warmth with clear boundaries. Romance becomes fortunate when admiration is paired with daily reliability, and when you stop treating vulnerability like a loss of status.
en.health: Wood Dragon is a tall tree rooted in a clouded reservoir: growth, command, and stored storm energy. Dragon stores water, wood, and earth, so the life path often carries unfinished inheritance, latent ambition, and a talent for making pressure productive. The gift is turning unfinished potential into visible structure; the shadow is carrying too much pride or responsibility in silence. Health improves when your routine respects the element balance rather than forcing one speed all year. The Dragon branch can show where stress collects: heat may rise through sleep and inflammation, water through fear and fatigue, earth through digestion and heaviness, metal through skin or breathing tension, and wood through nerves or liver pressure. Your body needs regular meals, predictable sleep, sunlight, stretching, and periods without performance. Emotional suppression is a bigger risk than ordinary tiredness, because it turns signal into symptom. Choose exercise that matches your nature: steady strength when scattered, mobility when rigid, breath work when anxious, and recovery before ambition turns heroic.
en.family: Wood Dragon is a tall tree rooted in a clouded reservoir: growth, command, and stored storm energy. Dragon stores water, wood, and earth, so the life path often carries unfinished inheritance, latent ambition, and a talent for making pressure productive. The gift is turning unfinished potential into visible structure; the shadow is carrying too much pride or responsibility in silence. Family patterns often involve responsibility, expectation, and a role you learned to play before you fully chose it. You may become the capable one, the quiet protector, the tasteful mediator, or the person who carries the plan when others lose direction. The Dragon branch suggests inherited stories that are not always spoken openly, so your task is to honor roots without repeating every emotional contract. Luck with family improves through practical boundaries: clear money rules, honest schedules, and fewer silent sacrifices. You can be deeply loyal, but loyalty should not erase your own season of growth. When you mature, you become a stabilizing ancestor in real time.
en.fame: Wood Dragon is a tall tree rooted in a clouded reservoir: growth, command, and stored storm energy. Fame and social recognition come when your signature becomes clear. You do not need to chase every spotlight; you need a recognizable standard, message, or style that people can attach to your name. The Dragon branch gives a particular public flavor, whether mysterious, bright, refined, protective, clever, or emotionally deep. K-drama-style reversals are possible: long quiet work can suddenly look inevitable once the right scene arrives. Avoid scandal born from pride, vague promises, or unmanaged emotion. Your best visibility is earned through craft plus timing. When you show both competence and a human story, people remember you beyond the first impression.

en.dayMasterDeep: Fire Horse is the sun riding its own noon horse: radiance, speed, and public magnetism. Horse is peak fire, quick applause, and restless visibility; it rewards courage but punishes waste, burnout, and careless declarations. The gift is making a room believe in motion; the shadow is burning through patience, sleep, or allies. As a Yang Fire day master, you are not meant to live vaguely. Your chart asks you to give form to instinct, polish to talent, and rhythm to ambition. In K-pop terms, this is not background-member energy; it is the person who understands the whole stage picture, then finds the exact moment to make the center move believable. When balanced, you combine emotional intelligence with a practical sense of timing, so people feel that you are both memorable and useful. When unbalanced, the same intensity can become pride, secrecy, impatience, or a refusal to ask for help. Your life improves whenever you choose one strong lane, build repeatable habits, and let trusted people witness the process instead of only the final performance. Luck grows through disciplined expression, not through hiding your complexity.
en.career: Fire Horse is the sun riding its own noon horse: radiance, speed, and public magnetism. Horse is peak fire, quick applause, and restless visibility; it rewards courage but punishes waste, burnout, and careless declarations. The gift is making a room believe in motion; the shadow is burning through patience, sleep, or allies. Career luck strengthens when you work where decisions matter and the result can be seen, measured, or felt by an audience. You suit roles that combine expertise with presence: strategy, product, content, management, design, finance, research, education, healing work, or performance depending on your training. The branch quality shows how you win: Horse energy rewards timing, reading the room, and using pressure as material. You should avoid jobs that reduce you to repetitive obedience with no room for judgment. A strong mentor helps early, but later you need ownership. Build a portfolio of finished outcomes, not just ideas. Your professional reputation rises when your standards become consistent enough for others to trust under deadline.
en.wealth: Fire Horse is the sun riding its own noon horse: radiance, speed, and public magnetism. The gift is making a room believe in motion; the shadow is burning through patience, sleep, or allies. Wealth is best built through structure rather than mood. Your money luck responds to skill stacking, long-view planning, and knowing which relationships actually create value. Because the Horse branch carries its own hidden rhythm, income may come in waves: quiet preparation, sudden opening, then a period where discipline decides whether the gain remains. Speculation, luxury spending, or emotional generosity can become leaks if you use money to prove confidence or affection. The better pattern is to separate cash flow, savings, investment, and creative risk. You can attract high-value opportunities when you package your taste and judgment clearly. Do not undercharge for insight that took years to earn.

You respond to people who respect your pace, notice your effort, and can handle both the public version of you and the private weather underneath. The Horse branch makes attraction specific: chemistry grows when timing, loyalty, and unspoken signals line up. You may test partners through silence, pride, speed, caretaking, or analysis depending on stress. That habit protects you briefly but can confuse someone sincere. The healthier path is direct warmth with clear boundaries. Romance becomes fortunate when admiration is paired with daily reliability, and when you stop treating vulnerability like a loss of status.

Emotional suppression is a bigger risk than ordinary tiredness, because it turns signal into symptom. Choose exercise that matches your nature: steady strength when scattered, mobility when rigid, breath work when anxious, and recovery before ambition turns heroic.

ko.fame: 임자일주는 자정의 조수와 만나는 검은 강의 상이다. 핵심은 흐름, 기억력, 전략적 감지력이며, 강점은 복잡한 관계망에서도 물길을 잃지 않는 힘, 과제는 생각이 깊어져 감정이 소용돌이가 되는 점이다. 한밤의 물는 겨울 물이 응축된 자리라 정보, 기억, 타이밍에 강하다. 명예운은 자기만의 기준과 스타일이 선명할 때 커진다. 모든 조명을 쫓기보다 한 분야에서 이름이 떠오르게 만들어야 한다. 자존심, 애매한 약속, 감정 폭발은 구설이 된다. 실력과 서사를 같이 보여주면 오래 기억된다.

en.dayMasterDeep: Water Ox is winter rain sealed under patient earth: reserve, endurance, and hidden nourishment. Ox is cold storage earth with water and metal; it protects resources, delays expression, and rewards patient craftsmanship. The gift is preserving value until the right thaw; the shadow is mistaking emotional freeze for wisdom. As a Yin Water day master, you are not meant to live vaguely. Your chart asks you to give form to instinct, polish to talent, and rhythm to ambition. In K-pop terms, this is not background-member energy; it is the person who understands the whole stage picture, then finds the exact moment to make the center move believable. When balanced, you combine emotional intelligence with a practical sense of timing, so people feel that you are both memorable and useful. When unbalanced, the same intensity can become pride, secrecy, impatience, or a refusal to ask for help. Your life improves whenever you choose one strong lane, build repeatable habits, and let trusted people witness the process instead of only the final performance. Luck grows through disciplined expression, not through hiding your complexity.
en.career: Water Ox is winter rain sealed under patient earth: reserve, endurance, and hidden nourishment. Ox is cold storage earth with water and metal; it protects resources, delays expression, and rewards patient craftsmanship. The gift is preserving value until the right thaw; the shadow is mistaking emotional freeze for wisdom. Career luck strengthens when you work where decisions matter and the result can be seen, measured, or felt by an audience. You suit roles that combine expertise with presence: strategy, product, content, management, design, finance, research, education, healing work, or performance depending on your training. The branch quality shows how you win: Ox energy rewards timing, reading the room, and using pressure as material. You should avoid jobs that reduce you to repetitive obedience with no room for judgment. A strong mentor helps early, but later you need ownership. Build a portfolio of finished outcomes, not just ideas. Your professional reputation rises when your standards become consistent enough for others to trust under deadline.
en.wealth: Water Ox is winter rain sealed under patient earth: reserve, endurance, and hidden nourishment. Ox is cold storage earth with water and metal; it protects resources, delays expression, and rewards patient craftsmanship. The gift is preserving value until the right thaw; the shadow is mistaking emotional freeze for wisdom. Wealth is best built through structure rather than mood. Your money luck responds to skill stacking, long-view planning, and knowing which relationships actually create value. Because the Ox branch carries its own hidden rhythm, income may come in waves: quiet preparation, sudden opening, then a period where discipline decides whether the gain remains. Speculation, luxury spending, or emotional generosity can become leaks if you use money to prove confidence or affection. The better pattern is to separate cash flow, savings, investment, and creative risk. You can attract high-value opportunities when you package your taste and judgment clearly. Do not undercharge for insight that took years to earn.
en.love: Water Ox is winter rain sealed under patient earth: reserve, endurance, and hidden nourishment. Ox is cold storage earth with water and metal; it protects resources, delays expression, and rewards patient craftsmanship. The gift is preserving value until the right thaw; the shadow is mistaking emotional freeze for wisdom. In love, you need more than surface compatibility. You respond to people who respect your pace, notice your effort, and can handle both the public version of you and the private weather underneath. The Ox branch makes attraction specific: chemistry grows when timing, loyalty, and unspoken signals line up. You may test partners through silence, pride, speed, caretaking, or analysis depending on stress. That habit protects you briefly but can confuse someone sincere. The healthier path is direct warmth with clear boundaries. Romance becomes fortunate when admiration is paired with daily reliability, and when you stop treating vulnerability like a loss of status.
en.health: Water Ox is winter rain sealed under patient earth: reserve, endurance, and hidden nourishment. Ox is cold storage earth with water and metal; it protects resources, delays expression, and rewards patient craftsmanship. The gift is preserving value until the right thaw; the shadow is mistaking emotional freeze for wisdom. Health improves when your routine respects the element balance rather than forcing one speed all year. The Ox branch can show where stress collects: heat may rise through sleep and inflammation, water through fear and fatigue, earth through digestion and heaviness, metal through skin or breathing tension, and wood through nerves or liver pressure. Your body needs regular meals, predictable sleep, sunlight, stretching, and periods without performance. Emotional suppression is a bigger risk than ordinary tiredness, because it turns signal into symptom. Choose exercise that matches your nature: steady strength when scattered, mobility when rigid, breath work when anxious, and recovery before ambition turns heroic.
en.family: Water Ox is winter rain sealed under patient earth: reserve, endurance, and hidden nourishment. The gift is preserving value until the right thaw; the shadow is mistaking emotional freeze for wisdom. Family patterns often involve responsibility, expectation, and a role you learned to play before you fully chose it. You may become the capable one, the quiet protector, the tasteful mediator, or the person who carries the plan when others lose direction. The Ox branch suggests inherited stories that are not always spoken openly, so your task is to honor roots without repeating every emotional contract. Luck with family improves through practical boundaries: clear money rules, honest schedules, and fewer silent sacrifices. You can be deeply loyal, but loyalty should not erase your own season of growth. When you mature, you become a stabilizing ancestor in real time.
en.fame: Water Ox is winter rain sealed under patient earth: reserve, endurance, and hidden nourishment. Ox is cold storage earth with water and metal; it protects resources, delays expression, and rewards patient craftsmanship. The gift is preserving value until the right thaw; the shadow is mistaking emotional freeze for wisdom. Fame and social recognition come when your signature becomes clear. You do not need to chase every spotlight; you need a recognizable standard, message, or style that people can attach to your name. The Ox branch gives a particular public flavor, whether mysterious, bright, refined, protective, clever, or emotionally deep. K-drama-style reversals are possible: long quiet work can suddenly look inevitable once the right scene arrives. Avoid scandal born from pride, vague promises, or unmanaged emotion. Your best visibility is earned through craft plus timing. When you show both competence and a human story, people remember you beyond the first impression.

ko.fame: 갑인일주는 봄 천둥과 함께 솟는 큰 나무의 상이다. 핵심은 개척성, 원칙, 영웅적 성장력이며, 강점은 남들이 말 못 한 길을 여는 힘, 과제는 동의가 당연한 듯 앞서 나가는 점이다. 봄 호랑이 나무은 봄의 시작이라 개척, 리더십, 성장 욕구가 선명하다. 명예운은 자기만의 기준과 스타일이 선명할 때 커진다. 모든 조명을 쫓기보다 한 분야에서 이름이 떠오르게 만들어야 한다. 자존심, 애매한 약속, 감정 폭발은 구설이 된다. 실력과 서사를 같이 보여주면 오래 기억된다.

en.dayMasterDeep: Wood Rabbit is soft vines filling a moonlit garden: beauty, diplomacy, and natural expansion. Rabbit is pure wood, elegant and persuasive, giving social grace, growth, aesthetics, and flexible influence. The gift is winning through timing, manners, and subtle design; the shadow is avoiding sharp truths until the garden overgrows. As a Yin Wood day master, you are not meant to live vaguely. Your chart asks you to give form to instinct, polish to talent, and rhythm to ambition. In K-pop terms, this is not background-member energy; it is the person who understands the whole stage picture, then finds the exact moment to make the center move believable. When balanced, you combine emotional intelligence with a practical sense of timing, so people feel that you are both memorable and useful. When unbalanced, the same intensity can become pride, secrecy, impatience, or a refusal to ask for help. Your life improves whenever you choose one strong lane, build repeatable habits, and let trusted people witness the process instead of only the final performance. Luck grows through disciplined expression, not through hiding your complexity.
en.career: Wood Rabbit is soft vines filling a moonlit garden: beauty, diplomacy, and natural expansion. Rabbit is pure wood, elegant and persuasive, giving social grace, growth, aesthetics, and flexible influence. The gift is winning through timing, manners, and subtle design; the shadow is avoiding sharp truths until the garden overgrows. Career luck strengthens when you work where decisions matter and the result can be seen, measured, or felt by an audience. You suit roles that combine expertise with presence: strategy, product, content, management, design, finance, research, education, healing work, or performance depending on your training. The branch quality shows how you win: Rabbit energy rewards timing, reading the room, and using pressure as material. You should avoid jobs that reduce you to repetitive obedience with no room for judgment. A strong mentor helps early, but later you need ownership. Build a portfolio of finished outcomes, not just ideas. Your professional reputation rises when your standards become consistent enough for others to trust under deadline.
en.wealth: Wood Rabbit is soft vines filling a moonlit garden: beauty, diplomacy, and natural expansion. Rabbit is pure wood, elegant and persuasive, giving social grace, growth, aesthetics, and flexible influence. The gift is winning through timing, manners, and subtle design; the shadow is avoiding sharp truths until the garden overgrows. Wealth is best built through structure rather than mood. Your money luck responds to skill stacking, long-view planning, and knowing which relationships actually create value. Because the Rabbit branch carries its own hidden rhythm, income may come in waves: quiet preparation, sudden opening, then a period where discipline decides whether the gain remains. Speculation, luxury spending, or emotional generosity can become leaks if you use money to prove confidence or affection. The better pattern is to separate cash flow, savings, investment, and creative risk. You can attract high-value opportunities when you package your taste and judgment clearly. Do not undercharge for insight that took years to earn.
en.love: Wood Rabbit is soft vines filling a moonlit garden: beauty, diplomacy, and natural expansion. Rabbit is pure wood, elegant and persuasive, giving social grace, growth, aesthetics, and flexible influence. The gift is winning through timing, manners, and subtle design; the shadow is avoiding sharp truths until the garden overgrows. In love, you need more than surface compatibility. You respond to people who respect your pace, notice your effort, and can handle both the public version of you and the private weather underneath. The Rabbit branch makes attraction specific: chemistry grows when timing, loyalty, and unspoken signals line up. You may test partners through silence, pride, speed, caretaking, or analysis depending on stress. That habit protects you briefly but can confuse someone sincere. The healthier path is direct warmth with clear boundaries. Romance becomes fortunate when admiration is paired with daily reliability, and when you stop treating vulnerability like a loss of status.
en.health: Wood Rabbit is soft vines filling a moonlit garden: beauty, diplomacy, and natural expansion. Rabbit is pure wood, elegant and persuasive, giving social grace, growth, aesthetics, and flexible influence. The gift is winning through timing, manners, and subtle design; the shadow is avoiding sharp truths until the garden overgrows. Health improves when your routine respects the element balance rather than forcing one speed all year. The Rabbit branch can show where stress collects: heat may rise through sleep and inflammation, water through fear and fatigue, earth through digestion and heaviness, metal through skin or breathing tension, and wood through nerves or liver pressure. Your body needs regular meals, predictable sleep, sunlight, stretching, and periods without performance. Emotional suppression is a bigger risk than ordinary tiredness, because it turns signal into symptom. Choose exercise that matches your nature: steady strength when scattered, mobility when rigid, breath work when anxious, and recovery before ambition turns heroic.
en.family: Wood Rabbit is soft vines filling a moonlit garden: beauty, diplomacy, and natural expansion. Rabbit is pure wood, elegant and persuasive, giving social grace, growth, aesthetics, and flexible influence. The gift is winning through timing, manners, and subtle design; the shadow is avoiding sharp truths until the garden overgrows. Family patterns often involve responsibility, expectation, and a role you learned to play before you fully chose it. You may become the capable one, the quiet protector, the tasteful mediator, or the person who carries the plan when others lose direction. The Rabbit branch suggests inherited stories that are not always spoken openly, so your task is to honor roots without repeating every emotional contract. Luck with family improves through practical boundaries: clear money rules, honest schedules, and fewer silent sacrifices. You can be deeply loyal, but loyalty should not erase your own season of growth. When you mature, you become a stabilizing ancestor in real time.
en.fame: Wood Rabbit is soft vines filling a moonlit garden: beauty, diplomacy, and natural expansion. Rabbit is pure wood, elegant and persuasive, giving social grace, growth, aesthetics, and flexible influence. The gift is winning through timing, manners, and subtle design; the shadow is avoiding sharp truths until the garden overgrows. Fame and social recognition come when your signature becomes clear. You do not need to chase every spotlight; you need a recognizable standard, message, or style that people can attach to your name. The Rabbit branch gives a particular public flavor, whether mysterious, bright, refined, protective, clever, or emotionally deep. K-drama-style reversals are possible: long quiet work can suddenly look inevitable once the right scene arrives. Avoid scandal born from pride, vague promises, or unmanaged emotion. Your best visibility is earned through craft plus timing. When you show both competence and a human story, people remember you beyond the first impression.

en.dayMasterDeep: Metal Monkey is a sharp blade moving through a metal city: skill, speed, and competitive intelligence. Monkey contains metal, water, and earth; it brings calculation, adaptability, and the instinct to turn constraints into a clever mechanism. The gift is solving hard problems under pressure; the shadow is treating every relationship like a test of dominance. As a Yang Metal day master, you are not meant to live vaguely. Your chart asks you to give form to instinct, polish to talent, and rhythm to ambition. In K-pop terms, this is not background-member energy; it is the person who understands the whole stage picture, then finds the exact moment to make the center move believable. When balanced, you combine emotional intelligence with a practical sense of timing, so people feel that you are both memorable and useful. When unbalanced, the same intensity can become pride, secrecy, impatience, or a refusal to ask for help. Your life improves whenever you choose one strong lane, build repeatable habits, and let trusted people witness the process instead of only the final performance. Luck grows through disciplined expression, not through hiding your complexity.

You should avoid jobs that reduce you to repetitive obedience with no room for judgment. A strong mentor helps early, but later you need ownership. Build a portfolio of finished outcomes, not just ideas. Your professional reputation rises when your standards become consistent enough for others to trust under deadline.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 경신일주는 금속 도시를 가르는 날카로운 칼의 상이다. 핵심은 기술, 속도, 경쟁적 지성이며, 강점은 압박 속에서 어려운 문제를 푸는 힘, 과제는 모든 관계를 우열 시험처럼 대하는 점이다. 예리한 보석 기운은 금수의 기운이 빠르게 도는 자리라 판단, 기술, 순발력이 강하다. 단순한 순응보다 자기 리듬을 세울 때 운이 열린다. K드라마 주인공처럼 늦게 드러나도 장면을 바꾸는 힘이 있다. 자존심, 침묵, 과속을 다스리고 실력과 신뢰를 함께 쌓으면 복이 커진다.
